# Let's load the files and inspect.
import json, sys, os, re, unicodedata
qpath = "/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
hpath = "/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json"
print(os.path.exists(qpath), os.path.exists(hpath))
with open(qpath, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    qdata = json.load(f)
with open(hpath, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hdata = json.load(f)
len(qdata), len(hdata), type(qdata[0])

# Let's implement normalization and search
import re
from difflib import SequenceMatcher
import unicodedata
def normalize_ar(text):
    if text is None:
        return ""
    # Normalize unicode NFC
    text = unicodedata.normalize("NFC", text)
    # remove verse numbers like (90) or ٩٠
    text = re.sub(r'\(\s*\d+\s*\)', ' ', text)
    # remove Arabic-Indic parentheses maybe: remove any digits or parentheses
    text = re.sub(r'[\d\(\)\[\]]+', ' ', text)
    # Remove tashkeel and other diacritics: Unicode combining marks
    # Keep letters, spaces
    # But preserve hamza/aleph normalizations: map 'أ','إ','آ','ٱ' to 'ا' and 'ؤ' 'ئ' to 'و' 'ي'? maybe unify only hamza on alef
    # We'll remove combining marks via unicode category Mn
    text = ''.join(ch for ch in text if unicodedata.category(ch) != 'Mn')
    # remove tatweel
    text = text.replace('\u0640', '')
    # map alef variations to plain alef
    text = re.sub('[إأآاٱ]', 'ا', text)
    # map hamza on waw/yeh maybe unify 'ؤ'->'و' and 'ئ'->'ي'?? But this can be risky. We'll map them to 'ء'? 
    # But simpler: map 'ؤ' and 'ئ' and 'ء' to 'ء' or to 'و'/'ي'? Hmm.
    # We'll map all hamza variations 'ءؤئ' to 'ء'
    text = re.sub('[ؤئ]', 'ء', text)
    # remove punctuation and symbols
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\u0621-\u064Aء\s]', ' ', text)
    # replace underscores/digits removed so just clean spaces
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    # lower-casing isn't relevant
    return text

# test normalization
full_span = "وأزلفت الجنة للمتقين (90) وبرزت الجحيم للغاوين (91) وقيل لهم أين ما كنتم تعبدون (92) من دون الله هل ينصرونكم أو ينتصرون (93) فكبكبوا فيها هم والغاوون (94) وجنود إبليس أجمعون (95) قالوا وهم فيها يختصمون تالله إن كنا لفي ضالين (96) إذ نسويكم برب العالمين (97) وما أضلنا إلا المجرمون (98) فما لنا من شافعين (99) ولا صديقدين (100) فلو أنلنا كرة فنكون من المؤمنين (101) إن في ذلك لآية وما كان أكثر الناس بمؤمنين (102)"
print(normalize_ar(full_span)[:200])

from difflib import SequenceMatcher

norm_full = normalize_ar(full_span)
# prepare qdata normalized list
q_norms = []
for entry in qdata:
    txt = entry.get("ayah_text","")
    n = normalize_ar(txt)
    q_norms.append((entry, n))

# function to compute LCS length for two strings
def lcs_length(a, b):
    # dynamic programming for length; but strings can be up to maybe 100s characters; okay
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    # implement dynamic programming row-wise for memory efficiency
    prev = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        curr = [0]*(m+1)
        ai = a[i-1]
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            if ai == b[j-1]:
                curr[j] = prev[j-1] + 1
            else:
                curr[j] = curr[j-1] if curr[j-1] > prev[j] else prev[j]
        prev = curr
    return prev[m]

# compute metrics
results = []
for entry, n in q_norms:
    if not n: continue
    # substring check
    is_sub = n in norm_full
    seq_ratio = SequenceMatcher(None, n, norm_full).ratio()
    lcs_len = lcs_length(n, norm_full)
    lcs_ratio = lcs_len / len(n) if len(n)>0 else 0
    # token precision
    tokens_c = n.split()
    tokens_full = norm_full.split()
    overlap = sum(1 for t in tokens_c if t in tokens_full)
    token_prec = overlap/len(tokens_c) if tokens_c else 0
    results.append((entry, n, is_sub, seq_ratio, lcs_ratio, token_prec, overlap))
    
# find top by lcs_ratio or seq_ratio or token_prec
results_sorted = sorted(results, key=lambda x: (x[4], x[3], x[5]), reverse=True)
results_sorted[:20]

# Extract ayahs for surah_id 26 ayah_id 90..102
cand_entries = [entry for entry in qdata if entry['surah_id']==26 and 90 <= entry['ayah_id'] <= 102]
# sort by ayah_id
cand_entries = sorted(cand_entries, key=lambda e: e['ayah_id'])
len(cand_entries), cand_entries[0], cand_entries[-1]

cand_text = " ".join([e['ayah_text'] for e in cand_entries])
cand_text

norm_cand = normalize_ar(cand_text)
# compute metrics vs norm_full
from difflib import SequenceMatcher
seq_ratio = SequenceMatcher(None, norm_cand, norm_full).ratio()
lcs_len = lcs_length(norm_cand, norm_full)
lcs_ratio = lcs_len / len(norm_cand) if len(norm_cand)>0 else 0
# token overlap F1 or precision
tokens_c = norm_cand.split()
tokens_full = norm_full.split()
overlap = sum(1 for t in tokens_c if t in tokens_full)
token_prec = overlap/len(tokens_c)
token_recall = overlap/len(tokens_full)
# token F1: using token_prec and recall
token_f1 = (2*token_prec*token_recall)/(token_prec+token_recall) if (token_prec+token_recall)>0 else 0

seq_ratio, lcs_ratio, token_prec, token_recall, token_f1, overlap, len(tokens_c), len(tokens_full)

content.text: {"correction":"وَأُزْلِفَتِ الْجَنَّةُ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ وَبُرِّزَتِ الْجَحِيمُ لِلْغَاوِينَ وَقِيلَ لَهُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنْتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ مِنْ دُونِ اللَّهِ هَلْ يَنْصُرُونَكُمْ أَوْ يَنْتَصِرُونَ فَكُبْكِبُوا فِيهَا هُمْ وَالْغَاوُونَ وَجُنُودُ إِبْلِيسَ أَجْمَعُونَ قَالُوا وَهُمْ فِيهَا يَخْتَصِمُونَ تَاللَّهِ إِنْ كُنَّا لَفِي ضَلَالٍ مُبِينٍ إِذْ نُسَوِّيكُمْ بِرَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ وَمَا أَضَلَّنَا إِلَّا الْمُجْرِمُونَ فَمَا لَنَا مِنْ شَافِعِينَ وَلَا صَدِيقٍ حَمِيمٍ فَلَوْ أَنَّ لَنَا كَرَّةً فَنَكُونَ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ"}
